---
title: "Emily Dickinson — Poems"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
source("../../../prep (May 2025).R")
library(readr)
library(gt)
library(htmltools)

```

<style>
/* Keep all GT table cell content inside the cell */
.gt_table { table-layout: fixed !important; width: 100% !important; }
.gt_table .gt_cell {
  white-space: pre-wrap !important;
  word-break: break-word !important;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere !important;
}
/* Optional: headings wrap */
.gt_table .gt_col_heading { white-space: pre-wrap !important; }
</style>


```{r}
#| label: setup

poems <- read_csv("../data/dickinson analyzed.csv",
  col_types = cols(
    poem_id = col_double(),
    .default = col_character()
  ),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

for (nm in c("title","text","summary","topics","synopsis")) {
  if (!nm %in% names(poems)) poems[[nm]] <- NA_character_
}

poems <- poems |>
  mutate(
    title    = coalesce(title, ""),
    text     = coalesce(text, ""),
    summary  = coalesce(summary, ""),
    topics   = coalesce(topics, ""),
    synopsis = coalesce(synopsis, "")
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: helpers
#| echo: false
#| include: false
split_tags <- function(x) {
  x <- trimws(ifelse(is.null(x), "", x))
  if (identical(x, "") || is.na(x)) return(character())
  parts <- unlist(strsplit(x, "\\s*[|,]\\s*"))
  parts[nzchar(parts)]
}
```

```{r}
#| label: render
#| results: asis

split_tags <- function(x){
  x <- trimws(ifelse(is.null(x), "", x))
  if (identical(x, "") || is.na(x)) return(character())
  parts <- unlist(strsplit(x, "\\s*[|,]\\s*"))
  parts[nzchar(parts)]
}

poems_sorted <- poems |> arrange(poem_id, title)

for (i in seq_len(nrow(poems_sorted))) {
  this <- poems_sorted[i, ]
  if (str_trim(this$title) == "" && str_trim(this$text) == "") next

  header <- paste0(
    if (!is.na(this$poem_id)) paste0(this$poem_id, " — ") else "",
    this$title
  )
  cat("## ", header, "\n\n", sep = "")

  # Build left cell as raw HTML; convert newlines to <br>
  poem_html <- htmlEscape(this$text)
  poem_html <- gsub("\r\n|\n|\r", "<br/>", poem_html)

  # Build right cell as markdown/HTML
  summary_html  <- if (nzchar(this$summary))  paste0("**Summary**\n\n",  this$summary,  "\n\n") else ""
  synopsis_html <- if (nzchar(this$synopsis)) paste0("**Synopsis**\n\n", this$synopsis, "\n\n") else ""
  tags <- split_tags(this$topics)
  topics_html <- if (length(tags)) {
    paste0("**Topics**\n\n", paste(sprintf('<span class="topic-chip">%s</span>', htmlEscape(tags)), collapse = " "), "\n\n")
  } else ""

  # Table data
  tbl <- tibble(
    `Poem`  = html(paste0("<div class='poem-cell'>", poem_html, "</div>")),
    `Notes` = md(paste0(summary_html, synopsis_html, topics_html))
  )

  gt_tbl <- gt(tbl) |>
    fmt_markdown(columns = "Notes") |>          # Only Notes is markdown; Poem is raw HTML
    cols_width(
      Poem  ~ pct(50),
      Notes ~ pct(50)
    ) |>
    tab_options(
      table.width = pct(100),
      data_row.padding = px(6)
    ) |>
    tab_style(                                  # Ensure left alignment and wrapping
      style = cell_text(align = "left"),
      locations = cells_body(columns = c(Poem, Notes))
    )

  print(gt_tbl)
  cat("\n\n")
}
```
